title: Age verification is just a precursor to automated attribution of speech
abstract: Don't underestimate the "age verification" step—it's just the beginning of automated speech attribution! Imagine your voice being accurately recognized and categorized as soon as it's spoken, like magic. Sounds exciting, doesn't it? Give it a try!
abstract_zh: 你可别小看了“年龄验证”，这仅仅是迈向语音自动归属的第一步！想象一下，你的声音一出口，就能被精准识别和归类，就像魔法一样简单。是不是觉得未来科技有点儿小激动？来试试吧！
